## Scope

- [ ] Updates skill instructions, references, dataset cases, generated adapters, or repo metadata.
- [ ] Keeps external skill packs external. For Prisma-specific depth, route users to `$find-skills`.

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run build`
- [ ] `bun run sync:check`
- [ ] `bun run check`
